INVOKE.NAME: %socialInteractionsDoc/socialInteractionStatus%='CANCELLED'||%socialInteractionsDoc/socialInteractionStatus%='COMPLETE'
INVOKE.COMMENT: social inetraction status is cancelled or complete, throw exception

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to add friend to social interaction as interaction status is COMPLETE or CANCELLED. Social Interaction ID: %socialInteractionsDoc/socialInteractionId%. Friend Entity Number: %friendEntityNumber%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: social interaction status allows for adding members to inetraction

INVOKE.COMMENT: get friend details from social interaction members table

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: socialInteractionMembers data dosen't exists, add friend to social interaction
get friend challenge id

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: api call is success and challenge details exists

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: api call is success and challenge period details exists

MAP.COMMENT: compare current date to challenge periods effective dates

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dates to determine current periods

SEQUENCE.NAME: %effDateCompChallengePeriodEffFromDate%='1'&&%effDateCompChallengePeriodEffToDate%='-1'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: effective date is within the challenge period effective dates

SEQUENCE.NAME: %effDateCompChallengePeriodEffFromDate%='0'||%effDateCompChallengePeriodEffToDate%='0'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: effective date is on challenge period effective dates

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve challenge periods data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve member challenges data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

INVOKE.COMMENT: add friend details to social interaction members table

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

MAP.COMMENT: --- VE-1438 notification publish --- api call is success, publish notification

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to create social interaction members data to DB. Error: %results/message%. Social Interaction ID: %socialInteractionsDoc/socialInteractionId%. Friend Entity Number: %friendEntityNumber%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: socialInteractionMembers data exists

MAP.COMMENT: map friend's social interactions members data

SEQUENCE.NAME: %socialInteractionsMembers/friendInteractionStatus%=='INVITED'||%socialInteractionsMembers/friendInteractionStatus%=='ACCEPTED'||%socialInteractionsMembers/friendInteractionStatus%=='INTEAM'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: friend may or may not be part of social interaction

INVOKE.NAME: %effectiveToDate%=='9999-12-31'
INVOKE.COMMENT: friend already part of social interaction, throw exception

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Friend is already part of social interaction. Social Interaction ID: %socialInteractionsDoc/socialInteractionId%. Friend Entity ID: %friendEntityNumber%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: friend is not part of social interaction, add friend
get friend challenge id

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: api call is success and challenge details exists

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: api call is success and challenge period details exists

MAP.COMMENT: compare current date to challenge periods effective dates

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dates to determine current periods

SEQUENCE.NAME: %effDateCompChallengePeriodEffFromDate%='1'&&%effDateCompChallengePeriodEffToDate%='-1'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: effective date is within the challenge period effective dates

SEQUENCE.NAME: %effDateCompChallengePeriodEffFromDate%='0'||%effDateCompChallengePeriodEffToDate%='0'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: effective date is on challenge period effective dates

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve challenge periods data from DB. Error: %results/message%

INVOKE.COMMENT: update friend details to social interaction members table

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

MAP.COMMENT: --- VE-1438 notification publish --- if api call is success, do nothing

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to update social interaction members data to DB. Error: %results/message%. Social Interaction ID: %socialInteractionsDoc/socialInteractionId%. Friend Entity Number: %friendEntityNumber%

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: friend is not part of social inetraction as status is uninvited or declined, update status to add to interaction
get friend challenge id

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: api call is success and challenge details exists

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: api call is success and challenge period details exists

MAP.COMMENT: compare current date to challenge periods effective dates

SEQUENCE.NAME: %effDateCompChallengePeriodEffFromDate%='1'&&%effDateCompChallengePeriodEffToDate%='-1'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: effective date is within the challenge period effective dates

SEQUENCE.NAME: %effDateCompChallengePeriodEffFromDate%='0'||%effDateCompChallengePeriodEffToDate%='0'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: effective date is on challenge period effective dates
